archetype: 7 (Electric & Neon) combined with 4 (Swiss/High Contrast Apple/Linear execution)

scale.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-bold uppercase

visual_effects.aurora_background: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-tr from-[#00E5D4]/10 via-transparent to-[#00B8FF]/10 blur-[100px] pointer-events-none
visual_effects.particles: Use tsparticles for floating triangles (matching the logo) and a moving starfield background.
visual_effects.mouse_spotlight: A subtle radial gradient (e.g., 400px circle) that follows the user's cursor across hero sections or bento grids.

navbar.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#05070A]/60 border-b border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] px-6 py-4 transition-all
navbar.elements: Logo left (neon cyan book with triangles), Desktop links center, Admin Link right. Hidden on mobile in favor of bottom nav.

mobile_bottom_nav.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-2xl bg-[#0D1117]/90 border-t border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] pb-safe pt-2 px-4 flex justify-between md:hidden
mobile_bottom_nav.icons: Use emojis (🏠 📚 📄 📖 🎥) for the nav items EXACTLY as specified. Active states should have a subtle #00E5D4 text highlight/glow.

card_bento.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[rgba(20,25,32,0.75)] backdrop-blur-md border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#00E5D4]/50 group
card_bento.icons: Strictly use lucide-react icons here. NO emojis in cards or headings.

button_primary.style: inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 rounded-xl bg-[#00E5D4]/10 text-[#00E5D4] border border-[#00E5D4]/30 hover:bg-[#00E5D4]/20 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,229,212,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 font-medium tracking-wide

file_item_row.style: flex items-center gap-4 p-4 rounded-xl bg-[#0D1117]/50 border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.05)] hover:bg-[rgba(20,25,32,0.9)] hover:border-[#00E5D4]/30 group transition-colors cursor-pointer

home.hero: Min-height 90vh, flex col center. Animated BITVERSE logo with cyan glowing triangles. Tagline: 'The Digital Universe of BIT Mesra'. Two primary buttons: Explore Notes / Previous Year Questions. Moving stars + heavy aurora blur background.
home.stats: Bento grid of 4 small glass cards showing live-animated counters (5000+ Notes, 1000+ PYQs, 20+ Subjects, 1000+ Students).
home.quick_access: 4 large glass cards (Notes, PYQs, Syllabus, Resources) with subtle neon hairlines and staggered fade+lift entrance.

notes_library.layout: Two-pane explorer style. Sidebar for Semesters -> Subjects. Main Area for Modules -> Files.
notes_library.file_viewer: In-browser viewer (PDF/PPT/DOC via Office Online, Images natively) inside a glassmorphic modal.

pyqs.layout: Grid organized by Subject -> Mid Sem / End Sem / Solutions.

admin_dashboard.layout: Control Room Grid layout (dense, functional). Open dashboard (no login). File upload forms, Add subject/module forms.

images.description: Luminous blue/cyan digital lines to be used at low opacity for cyber background overlay
Dark hallway with neon digital numbers for abstract data aesthetic
Black and cyan elegant abstract curves for card backgrounds

testing_rules: All interactive elements and key informational areas MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case format.
general_instructions: 1. Do not use standard Shadcn component styles if they conflict with the Apple/Linear futuristic aesthetic. Override them using the provided glassmorphism and neon glow utilities.
2. Stick strictly to the Dark Futuristic theme colors. No purple gradients. Neon Cyan (#00E5D4) is the sole anchor.
3. Implement magnetic hover effects for main buttons using framer-motion.
4. Use lucide-react for all standard UI icons (except mobile bottom nav where specific emojis are mandated).
5. Ensure code is limited to .js and .jsx files (No TypeScript).
